summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM Fakulti after refactoring from 4647 lines to modular files. All 26 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend tests PASSED after fixing 1 bug. The refactoring is successful - all endpoints work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring from 4647 lines to 337 lines in server.py is successful
All 15 route files are properly organized and working
Fixed bug: GET /api/leads was returning array instead of {leads: [], total: number} - this broke the frontend LeadsPage
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/leads.py - Fixed GET /api/leads to return {leads: [], total: number} format
/app/backend/tests/test_refactored_api.py - Created comprehensive test suite for all endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactoring testing complete. All API endpoints verified working: health, auth (login, me, password-reset-requests, change-password), dashboard (stats, advisor-stats), leads (CRUD), products, advisors, automation rules, config (whatsapp, ai), campaigns, qr-campaigns, reminders, chat (sessions, whatsapp-stats), loyalty (sequences, metrics), notifications. One bug was found and fixed: GET /api/leads was returning array instead of {leads: [], total: number} format which broke the frontend LeadsPage component.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/auth/login (admin): PASS - Returns token and user info
backend_endpoints.POST /api/auth/login (developer): PASS - Returns token and user info
backend_endpoints.GET /api/config/whatsapp: PASS - Returns WA config with business_name

frontend_ui.leads_page: PASS - Shows 11 leads in kanban view (after fix)

bugs_fixed.bug: LeadsPage showing 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading forEach)' error
bugs_fixed.root_cause: GET /api/leads was returning array directly instead of {leads: [], total: number} format expected by frontend
bugs_fixed.fix: Modified /app/backend/routes/leads.py to return {leads: leads, total: total} instead of just leads array
